subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! The dawning-places of falsehood and hypocrisy have ever prevented their followers from drawing nigh unto and achieving unity with His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله لازال مطالع کذب و نفاق اصحاب خود را از تقرب و اتفاق با عباد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
